scripts.build:lab: bun install --cwd lab --frozen-lockfile && ANYCAST_LAB_NATIVE_STATUS_URL=${ANYCAST_LAB_NATIVE_STATUS_URL:-https://axkc26fwhzeb.objectstorage.ap-chuncheon-1.oci.customer-oci.com/n/axkc26fwhzeb/b/anycast_lab/o/anycast-lab/native-v86/channels/stable/status.json} ANYCAST_LAB_NATIVE_MODE=external bun run --cwd lab build && node scripts/sync-lab.mjs
scripts.build:lab:from-source: bun install --cwd lab --frozen-lockfile && bun run --cwd lab build:v86-image && ANYCAST_LAB_NATIVE_MODE=local ANYCAST_LAB_REQUIRE_NATIVE=1 bun run --cwd lab build && node scripts/sync-lab.mjs
